name: @gjsify/integration-ts-for-gir
description: Integration tests: ts-for-gir packages on GJS and Node. Phase 1 covers @gi.ts/parser against gjsify's own Vala-generated GIR fixtures (validates fast-xml-parser on SpiderMonkey 128).

scripts.build:cli:node: gjsify build src/cli.entry.ts --app node --outfile dist/cli.node.mjs --define '__TS_FOR_GIR_VERSION__="4.0.0-rc.8"' --external typedoc,@inquirer/prompts,inquirer
scripts.build:test: yarn build:cli && yarn build:test:node && yarn build:test:gjs
scripts.test: yarn build:test && yarn test:node && yarn test:gjs

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
